title: rootless: add support for pod
body: add support for the pod command in rootless containers

comments.body: That might break when we move into CRI-O, but for now it should be functional enough

> That might break when we move into CRI-O, but for now it should be functional enough

Specifically to CRI-O it should not be an issue as it already must run in an userns, but I agree it looks hacky to require an user of the `libpod` package to have an `info` command that re-exec into an user namespace.  One thing to investigate is the reexec module from containers/storage and if it can be helpful here.

LGTM
I would like @mheon and @AkihiroSuda TO approve before we merge,
I think it is an error in the tests and how the rootless podman is launched, it was introduced by the last patch.  I am still investigating it as I hit it locally as well
I dropped the last patch, I will work on it as a follow-up as it is not strictly related to this PR
tests are green and I've included the change @AkihiroSuda suggested

:pushpin: Commit 04b8506 has been approved by `mheon`
